question_text: A steel paper clip is placed 5 cm away from a bar magnet. The paper clip is attracted to the magnet and moves towards it. How far does the paper clip move?
correct_answer: 5 cm (the paper clip moves the full distance to reach the magnet)
explanation: The paper clip starts 5 cm away from the magnet. Since it is attracted and moves towards the magnet, it travels the entire 5 cm distance until it touches the magnet. Steel is a magnetic material, so it will be pulled across the gap.
